caption: A man with a tall, silver-grey wig and glasses is seated in a room that appears to be a recording studio or shop, wearing a white button-down shirt with a red bow tie and suspenders. He wears large black over-ear headphones and speaks into a professional microphone positioned in front of him. In the background, walls are decorated with framed photographs and clothing items, including a yellow shirt with "LEE" visible. A logo on the left side of the screen reads "THE TALK SHOW" above "PODCAST," and another graphic on the right reads "BOSS TALK JOY." Throughout the sequence, the man remains seated and continues speaking, with slight changes in his facial expression and the movement of his mouth as he talks. The camera remains static, focusing on him from the waist up.
